overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man 2 showing the player character in a black symbiote suit with glowing green spider emblem walking through a rainy New York City street. The character navigates urban intersections, passes police vehicles and yellow taxis, and briefly enters a combat stance with pedestrians before continuing down a narrow commercial street lined with brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with police presence and wet pavement

events.description: police sedan with flashing lights drives past on the left side
approaching and stepping onto cobblestone crosswalk intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the city street approaching intersections, passing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: police sedan driving past with emergency lights activated

entered.detail: white police car with blue stripes and flashing roof lights
multi-story red brick buildings with fire escapes lining both sides of the street
tall black lamppost with ornate design typical of urban downtown areas
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city street lined with red brick apartment buildings. A police sedan with flashing lights passes by on the left. The camera follows the character as they approach a cobblestone intersection with visible crosswalk markings, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city avenue with taxi traffic and distant bridge view

events.description: crossing wide intersection with multiple yellow taxi cabs visible
slight turn to follow sidewalk curve while passing groups of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide avenue and continuing along the sidewalk, navigating through pedestrian crowds

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street with roof light illuminated

entered.detail: classic yellow taxi with illuminated roof sign driving along the avenue
suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
large bridge structure visible in the distant background between buildings
white passenger car stopped at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider city avenue with yellow taxis and moderate traffic. The character crosses the street and continues along the sidewalk, passing various pedestrians. A suspension bridge is visible in the distant background between the brick buildings. The wet pavement reflects the overcast sky and surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with storefronts and signage

events.description: character suddenly raises arms in aggressive combat stance toward nearby pedestrians who react and scatter
entering narrower street section with increased commercial signage and storefront density

agents.ego_description: briefly engaging pedestrians in an intimidating combat stance with arms raised, then continuing to walk down the narrow street

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians reacting to the character's aggressive posture by raising hands and stepping back

entered.detail: ground-level shops with large windows and awnings, including a restaurant with red signage
green public waste bins and blue USPS mailboxes on the sidewalk
vertical signs with illuminated text for businesses including Chinese characters
cars parked along the curb of the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts and signage. At approximately 42 seconds, the character abruptly stops and raises their arms in a combat stance, causing nearby pedestrians to react defensively. The scene continues down the wet narrow street with parked cars on the left and various commercial establishments on the right, maintaining the overcast urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy New York City environment that shifts from residential brick streets to a wide urban avenue and finally into a narrow commercial corridor. It begins with the character walking past red brick apartment buildings and a police sedan with flashing lights, moving toward a cobblestone intersection under overcast skies. As the character crosses the street, the scene opens into a wider avenue filled with yellow taxis and reflections on the wet pavement, revealing a distant suspension bridge framed by the architecture. The camera then follows the character as they enter a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts, where they abruptly stop and raise their arms in a combat stance. The movement finally continues down this confined urban passage, passing parked cars and various businesses while maintaining the moody, overcast atmosphere.
